tagline: Photo booth rentals that keep the line moving.

contact.serviceArea: Open-air photo booths, backdrop rentals, props, print strips, digital galleries, weddings, school events, corporate parties, and community nights in North Loop, Oak Hill, Westbrook, Maple Bend, and nearby venues

copy.heroText: FlashDash brings a sharp booth, clean props, backdrop options, and a setup plan that keeps guests moving.
copy.introTitle: Props are fun. Guest flow is the real magic.
copy.introText: We match booth style, backdrop space, guest count, print or digital needs, and setup timing before the first flash.
copy.quoteText: Compare packages with date, venue, guest count, backdrop preference, and event window. We will match the package and confirm setup needs.

services.title: Open-Air Booth
services.text: A clean kiosk, backdrop, prop table, attendant setup, and fast guest flow for parties and receptions.

services.title: Print Strip Package
services.text: Classic strips, tidy prop rotation, and event-ready print timing for guests who want a keepsake.

services.title: Digital Gallery Booth
services.text: Quick captures, share-ready gallery delivery, and a lighter setup for modern events and tight spaces.

process.title: Check the date
process.text: Venue, event window, guest count, and booth preference help us confirm fit.

process.title: Plan the corner
process.text: We map power, backdrop space, line flow, prop table, and arrival timing before the event.

process.title: Run the booth
process.text: Setup, guest guidance, prop reset, and handoff stay simple while the party keeps moving.

proof.label: guest flow and props kept tidy

brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic fixed-bottom-action recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.turnaround: 6 x 8 ft: typical booth footprint planned early.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Share the event date, venue, guest count, setup window, outlet access, 6-by-8-foot booth corner, backdrop preference, prop needs, and print or digital delivery choice.
serviceDetails.prepNote: Venue, event window, guest count, and booth preference help us confirm fit.

serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For photo booth rental service, outlet access, 6-by-8-foot booth footprint, backdrop placement, prop table, guest line flow, print timing, and breakdown rules are checked before the date is held.
